content_body: Two friends and I rented Stonybrook Lodge for the weekend - Friday through Sunday. The cabin is spacious, beautifully appointed, and the setting is breathtaking. The home overlooks Fightingtown Creek and has screened decks on both the main and upstairs levels. Stairs lead down to a small clubhouse right on the creek. We wanted a private, quiet, scenic location and we could not have been more pleased. I would highly recommend this rental and look forward to a return visit as soon as possible.
title: "Could Not Have Been More Pleased"
